active_telemetry_anomalies: TAG-PT-809: Vapor Space Pressure Rate-of-Change Elevated
active_compliance_breaches: OISD-STD-105: Deferred Maintenance on Relief Valve EQ-PRV-810
current_operational_signature.human_factor_context: Shift Changeover in Progress (Night Shift to Morning Shift) - Incomplete Electronic Handover Log.

historical_pattern_matches.incident_name: Visakhapatnam Steel Plant Gas Leak (2020) & Texas City Refinery Explosion (2005) Hybrid Vector
causal_event_chain: 1. Deferred maintenance on critical relief systems.
2. Creeping pressure anomalies ignored or unacted upon by control room.
3. Critical information lost during shift handover.
4. Runaway reaction leading to containment loss/ignition.
regulatory_recurrence_flags: Repeated failure to enforce Factory Act Section 41 (Hazardous Processes).

targeted_mitigation_recommendations: IMMEDIATE: Halt shift changeover process. Mandate physical walkdown of Tank Farm B by incoming and outgoing Shift Leads jointly.
IMMEDIATE: Acknowledge and resolve pressure alarm on TAG-PT-809. Initiate manual vapor venting if auto-valve EQ-PRV-810 remains unresponsive.
SECONDARY: Trigger Site-wide Tier 1 Process Safety Alert to Standby Emergency Response Team.
